race.comment: OUR BRAVE LINI (7) is unlucky to still be a maiden hitting the top-five in all six career outings to date and strikes a very winnable contest here. Strips fitter second-up from the spell and the step-up in trip should suit. Rates a leading contender. SECRET FENKEL (2) just ran into one better in town when resuming and is sure to find this assignment a touch easier. Looms as the main danger. CRYPTION'S DESIRE (1) has hit the frame at the past couple including placing around this circuit last time out. Top-three candidate. PROMISES MADE (8) gets a stack of weight relief with the 3kg claim and will be rock-hard fit for this. One for the multiples. ELEGANT FORCE (5) next in line from the Lees barn.
